avengers_pro_local_tfidf.note: Official semantic-cluster mechanism with local TF-IDF in place of the paper code's external embedding service.

taskset_learned_list.note: Paper-style transferred learned list; validation transfer is much worse than train (0.20053756).

fsbo.note: Official checkpoint covers HPO-B space 4796; compact task remaps three spaces to anonymous IDs and forbids the learned GP stack in candidates.

schedule_free_adamw.note: Reference update is local, but task has no eval-mode callback for the averaged x iterate.

distributed_shampoo.note: Meta official implementation; evaluator-owned adapter restores U/V tensor shapes erased by the candidate API.

gradient_compression.diagnostic: Published-family methods lose to local top-k plus classical error feedback (0.642184); workload/metric does not preserve the expected frontier.

kv_cache.diagnostic: Ada-SnapKV wins on validation but loses on the two-document train split; sample size is too small for stable method ordering.

awq.note: Official AWQ import requires compiled awq_inference_engine and supports Qwen2/Llama block recipes, not Qwen3.5 hybrid GatedDeltaNet; current task exposes no calibration activations.

slm_compression.diagnostic: Validation score has saturated at the zero clamp during the live campaign, so the current scalar is invalid for frontier comparison.
